_meta.name: diagnostic_npde
external_method_references: Brendel K, Comets E, Laffont C, Laveille C, Mentre F (2006) Metrics for external model evaluation with an application to the population pharmacokinetics of gliclazide.
Comets E, Brendel K, Mentre F (2008) Computing normalised prediction distribution errors to evaluate nonlinear mixed-effect models: the npde add-on package for R.
_meta.notes: Self-consistent openpkpd regression baseline enriched with literature-backed NPDE expectations for calibration and misspecification sensitivity. Useful for drift detection, but not yet a published-dataset or cross-software parity reference.
